Title: ~mission(title)
DisplayDescription:
You fast? You deadly? You looking to make some serious creds? Then I got the race for you.

I'm talking a weapons free, old school scramble. Pilot a [RaceType|Short], collect checkpoints, steal points from the leader, and win big. Whoever gets enough points first is declared champion and gets a fat payout. 2nd and 3rd place even get prizes too.  

Let me know if you're interested, and I'll send you the starting coordinates once the race is set up. In the meanwhile, feel free to get your [RaceType] ready to go. [RaceType|ScrambleRaceASOP]
